systemOverview.executiveSummary: Stock Buddy Skills Suite is a comprehensive DSE stock analysis system combining 14 specialized AI-powered skills with multiple distribution channels (Agent Skills, MCP server, CLI) and robust data integration.
systemOverview.systemPurpose: Provide Bangladesh stock market investors with AI-powered analysis tools for momentum trading, investment analysis, and business intelligence through modern agent interfaces and MCP clients.
systemOverview.architecturalApproach: Microservice-style architecture with pure Python analysis skills as the core, thin distribution layers (gh skill, MCP server), pluggable data adapters, and comprehensive CI/CD infrastructure.

externalDependencies.purpose: Source hosting, gh skill distribution, CI/CD

assumptionsAndConstraints: Skills remain stdlib-only Python with no network calls
Public data sources only for compliance

architecturePrinciples.name: Single Source of Truth
architecturePrinciples.description: Skill folders are canonical; all distribution channels dispatch to the same core skills
architecturePrinciples.rationale: Prevents logic drift and ensures consistency across all access methods
implications: No analysis logic in distribution layers
All improvements go to core skills

architecturePrinciples.name: Pure Functions Architecture
architecturePrinciples.description: Skills are stateless, deterministic functions with JSON in/out
implications: Data fetching isolated in adapter layer

architecturePrinciples.name: Pluggable Data Layer
architecturePrinciples.description: Data sources abstracted behind provider interface
architecturePrinciples.rationale: Allows testing, multiple data sources, and compliance with data policies
implications: Caching and rate limiting in adapter

architecturePrinciples.name: Security by Design
architecturePrinciples.description: Supply chain hardening, scanning, and immutable releases
architecturePrinciples.rationale: Executable code distributed to users requires trust and verification

architecturePrinciples.name: Multi-Agent Specialization
architecturePrinciples.description: Different agents for different analysis perspectives
architecturePrinciples.rationale: Complex analysis benefits from specialized expertise
